tools.name: show_claims_dashboard
tools.title: Show Claims Dashboard
tools.description: Displays the Zava Insurance claims dashboard showing all claims with status overview, filters, and summary metrics. Supports filtering by status and/or policy holder name.

policyHolderName.description: Filter claims by policy holder name. Supports partial, case-insensitive matching.

tools.name: show_claim_detail
tools.title: Show Claim Detail
tools.description: Displays detailed information about a specific insurance claim including related inspections, purchase orders, and contractor assignments. Use claim ID (e.g. '1', '2') or claim number (e.g. 'CN202504990').

claimId.description: The claim ID or claim number to look up

tools.name: show_contractors
tools.title: Show Contractors
tools.description: Displays the list of contractors available for insurance repair work. Optionally filter by specialty or preferred status.

tools.name: update_claim_status
tools.description: Updates the status of an insurance claim. Use claim ID (e.g. '1', '2').

note.description: Optional note to add to the claim

tools.name: update_inspection
tools.description: Updates an inspection record — status, findings, recommended actions, property, or inspector assignment.

tools.name: update_purchase_order
tools.description: Updates a purchase order status (e.g. approve, reject, complete).

tools.name: get_claim_summary
tools.description: Returns a text summary for a specific claim with key details. Use claim ID or claim number.

tools.name: create_inspection
tools.description: Creates a new inspection record. Only claimNumber is required. ID is auto-generated, status defaults to 'open'.

tools.name: list_inspectors
tools.description: Lists all available inspectors with their specializations.
